items.title: [正面] The game undeniably has bad translations currently...
items.summary:
The game undeniably has bad translations currently, but damn... is the game itself incredible. Everything from the story and the character backstories, to the varied team comps, mechanics, and challenges is in my opinion "perfect." The only drawback is that a lot of things are locked behind main storyline progression, which can make playing through it a "forced" experience. I personally also want a skin system added into the game, to give some life into forgotten characters.

10/10 game, hope the GPT translations don't hold it back for too long.

items.title:
[正面] GOOD:

Lovecraftian gacha.

It's quite generous wi...
items.summary:
GOOD:

Lovecraftian gacha.

It's quite generous with pulls, more akin to a character collector.

PVP isn't P2W. You may unlock more options if you play a lot or "swipe" but that doesn't mean more power.

EDIT¹: Most of the translation (that was AI) is made by humans now and it's awesome. Not yet complete, but they're doing a great job.

NEUTRAL
Be warned, progress isn't fast. The game will tempt you with offers and money for sure speed up the process.

BAD

EDIT²: There are rewards gated behing the PvP mode. It's a whole different mode from the rest of the game. It's not 100% F2P, but at least friendly enough. My point is that if you don't like the mode (or PvP in general), you'll miss a lots of rewards since there isn't a "PvE" alternative for it.
